reviews.comment:
Lavadero de auto: consulte al whats ap de la empresa por el servicio de lavado completo ya que necesitaba lavar el motor, me explicaron que debia sacar 2 turnos asta ahi todo genial, tenia turno de 9 11hs 8y58 mi pareja ya estaba ahi pero justo quien atendia el lavadero estaba pasando la hidro en la playa y le pidio que esperara para estacionar, 9y08 le hizo seña que estacione cuando le va a dejar la llave del auto esta persona muy prepotente le dice que tiene que llegar 10 minutos antes cuando en la pagina cuando sacas el turno dice que del horario tenes 10 min de tolerancia, a lo que mi pareja le dice llegue 2 min antes y vos no me dejaste estacionar le pregunto si le dejaba el auto o no y de mala manera le dijo que si al retirar el auto nunca le hicieron el lavado de motor es decir lo tuvieron una hora mas al p ... y era lo que mas necesitaba    llame y escribi al whats app y ni me contestaron un 0 pesima atencion

(Translated by Google)
Car wash: I contacted the company via WhatsApp about the full wash service because I needed the engine washed. They explained that I had to book two appointments, which was fine up to that point. I had an appointment for 9:00 AM and 8:58 AM. My partner was already there, but the person working at the car wash was using the pressure washer on the parking area and asked her to wait to park. At 9:08 AM, he signaled for her to park when he went to give her the car keys. This very arrogant person told her she had to arrive 10 minutes early, even though the website where you book the appointment says you have a 10-minute grace period. My partner told him, "I arrived 2 minutes early and you didn't let me park. I asked if she could keep the car or not, and he rudely said yes." When she picked up the car, they never did the engine wash; they kept it for an extra hour, which was what she needed most. I called and messaged them on WhatsApp, and they didn't even answer. A zero for terrible service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkdk1QNEJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Debería darle vergüenza tener sólo 4 puestos de 6 y 2 personas atendiendo, además sólo se puede cargar del lado de la tapa, la mayoría tiene la tapa a la izquierda, así que los puestos atendiendo se reducen a 2, demoré 1 hora aprox

(Translated by Google)
They should be ashamed of having only 4 six-bay bays and 2 people working. Plus, you can only load from the lid side, and most have the lid on the left, so the number of working bays is reduced to 2. It took me about an hour.

reviews.comment:
El dia sábado 13hs pasa a cargar combustible y hace fila de unos 20 autos aprox, faltando 8 autos entro el camión a descargar el combustible. Lo cual tardo 1:40hs. Bueno espere tranki mi turno. Cuando me atienden un señor Emilio valllejos con una mala onda, cara de c..... y muy soberbio prepotente ( no es la primera vez que me atienen asi) cuando fui a pagar los 17.mil de super. El se retira y vuelve a los 15minutos. Super prepotente. Muy mala atención pésima. Espero una respuesta o que hagan algo al respecto xque no soy el único que se a quejado de este señor. Saludos

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday at 1pm, I went to fill up my gas tank and got in line for about 20 cars. With 8 cars left, the truck came in to unload the fuel. It took 1:40 hours. So, I waited quietly for my turn. When I was served, a Mr. Emilio Vallejos was very rude, had a face like that, and was very arrogant and overbearing (this isn't the first time I've been treated like this). When I went to pay the 17,000 for the super, he left and came back 15 minutes later. Super arrogant. Very bad service. I hope for a response or for them to do something about it because I'm not the only one who has complained about this man. Regards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkakx6ajdnRRAB
